REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.

→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Giff — Bardic Musician HP: 58/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Giff — Bardic Musician (distant).
--- Giff — Bardic Musician --- HP: 58/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 135/138
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Giff — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Giff — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Giff — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Giff — Bardic Musician HP: 19/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
